DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF CREDITOR'S TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO POST-JUDGMENT PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES BY DSB FURNISHING DECOR, INC., DBA FURNISHING DECOR AND DUNG Q. BUI, INDIVIDUALLY, IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANTS' FAILURE TO RESPOND AND TO RESPOND FULLY WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND AND TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $640, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES
Off Calendar Jul-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditor's Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Post-Judgment Production of Documents and For Defendant's Failure To Respond To Post-Judgment Interrogatories by DSB Furnishing Decor, Inc., DBA Furnishing Decor and Dung Q. Bui, Individually, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants' failure to respond and to respond fully were a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants are ordered to respond and to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/EAH) COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Discovery; And Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Resner, Esq. 707-522-0114 specially appearing for Stephen Kappos, Esq. for plaintiff and moving party Creditors Trade Association, Inc.
Jenifer Gardella, Esq., 650-364-7767 for defendant and opposing party DSB Flooring

RULING:
The Court MODIFIED its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WILl BE GRANTED IF THE BURDEN SHIFTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Plaintiff's counsel submitted form of order for The Court's consideration. (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
